description: OCR/vision text sidecar for image-only datasheets. Keys are repository-relative PDF paths; rows use label | value unit | method | context so the shared parser can extract observations without treating unit exponents as values.

filament_datasheets/Fiberlogy/Fiberlogy.text:
Technical Data Sheet: Fiberlogy EASY PLA
Trade Name
Fiberlogy EASY PLA
Manufacturer
Fiberlab S.A., Brzezie 387, 32-014 Brzezie, Poland
Description
EASY PLA filament designed for printing in FFF/FDM technology, available in different colors, wound on a spool or as a refill, vacuum-packed in a plastic bag, placed in a cardboard box.
Last update: May 20, 2025
rows: Tensile Strength @ Yield | 60 MPa | ASTM D882 | yield
Tensile Strength @ Break | 53 MPa | ASTM D882 | break
Izod Impact Strength (Notched) @ 23C | 16 J/m | ASTM D256 | notched at 23 C
Heat Distortion Temperature @ 0.45 MPa | 55 C | ASTM E2092 | 0.45 MPa load
Glass Transition Temperature Tg | 55 - 60 C | ASTM D3418
Melting Temperature Tm | 145 - 160 C | ASTM D3418

filament_datasheets/Fiberlogy/Fiberlogy.text:
Technical Data Sheet: Fiberlogy IMPACT PLA
Trade Name
Fiberlogy IMPACT PLA
Manufacturer
Fiberlab S.A., Brzezie 387, 32-014 Brzezie, Poland
Description
IMPACT PLA filament designed for printing in FFF/FDM technology, available in different colors, wound on a spool, vacuum-packed in a plastic bag, placed in a cardboard box.
Mechanical and starred thermal data are for 3D printed parts, XY axis, 100% infill, annealed at 110C / 15min.
Last update: May 26, 2025
rows: Tensile Strength | 40 MPa | ASTM D638 | XY axis, annealed at 110 C / 15 min
Tensile Modulus | 2870 MPa | ASTM D638 | XY axis, annealed at 110 C / 15 min
Flexural Strength | 73 MPa | ASTM D790 | XY axis, annealed at 110 C / 15 min
Flexural Modulus | 2410 MPa | ASTM D790 | XY axis, annealed at 110 C / 15 min
Izod Impact Strength (Notched) @ 23C | 160 J/m | ASTM D256 | notched at 23 C, XY axis, annealed at 110 C / 15 min
Heat Distortion Temperature @ 0.45 MPa | 75 - 85 C | ASTM E2092 | 0.45 MPa load, XY axis, annealed at 110 C / 15 min
Glass Transition Temperature Tg | 55 - 60 C | ASTM D3418
Melting Temperature Tm | 165 - 180 C | ASTM D3418

filament_datasheets/Fiberlogy/Fiberlogy.text:
Technical Data Sheet: Fiberlogy PLA MINERAL
Trade Name
Fiberlogy PLA MINERAL
Manufacturer
Fiberlab S.A., Brzezie 387, 32-014 Brzezie, Poland
Description
PLA MINERAL filament designed for printing in FFF/FDM technology, available in different colors, wound on a spool, vacuum-packed in a plastic bag, placed in a cardboard box.
Last update: May 29, 2025
rows: Tensile Strength @ Yield | 45 MPa | ISO 527 | yield
Tensile Strength @ Break | 30 MPa | ISO 527 | break
Charpy Impact Strength (Unnotched) @ 23C | 59 kJ/m2 | ISO 179 | unnotched at 23 C
Heat Distortion Temperature @ 0.45 MPa | 48 C | ISO 75 | 0.45 MPa load

filament_datasheets/Fiberlogy/Fiberlogy.text:
Technical Data Sheet: Fiberlogy PLA CF
Trade Name
Fiberlogy PLA CF
Manufacturer
Fiberlab S.A., Brzezie 387, 32-014 Brzezie, Poland
Description
PLA CF filament designed for printing in FFF/FDM technology, available in black color, wound on a spool, vacuum-packed in a plastic bag, placed in a cardboard box.
Starred thermal values are annealed.
Last update: May 26, 2025
rows: Tensile Strength @ Yield | 55 MPa | ISO 527 | yield
Tensile Strength @ Break | 50 MPa | ISO 527 | break
Charpy Impact Strength (Unnotched) @ 23C | 100.0 kJ/m2 | ISO 179 | unnotched at 23 C
Charpy Impact Strength (Notched) @ 23C | 3.1 kJ/m2 | ISO 179 | notched at 23 C
Heat Distortion Temperature @ 0.45 MPa | 137 C | ISO 75 | 0.45 MPa load, annealed
Vicat Softening Temperature | 89 C | ISO 306 | annealed
